label_name_visible.0: Accessible name must match or contain the visible label text
label_name_visible.Fail_1: Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text

input_label_visible.0: An input element must have an associated visible label

form_submit_button_exists.0: A <form> element should have a submit button or an image button
form_submit_button_exists.Potential_1: Verify the <form> element has a submit button or an image button

aria_form_label_unique.0: Each element with "form" role must have a unique label that describes its purpose
aria_form_label_unique.fail_label_not_unique: Multiple elements with "form" role do not have unique labels
